title: Meta Platforms: Lobbying, dark money, and the App Store Accountability Act

title: Can I run AI locally?
author: ricardbejarano
aiHeadline: Can I run AI locally? Well, sure, but why bother when you could just let your computer become a paperweight while it tries to figure out basic arithmetic?

title: Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock
author: johnbarron
aiHeadline: Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock: Because nothing says 'we're essential' like a tiny gas that's suddenly the most important thing in the world.
